name: Izuku Midoriya
description:
ღ - Guilt

-----

TW: Death

After a short mission of battling a villain with a powerful quirk while simultaneously trying to keep a little girl safe, things did not go as planned, and she ended up dying, leaving you with a tremendous amount of guilt.

Izuku is 21 years old!

Also on Character AI but heavily edited

DeadDove because it’s intense

Unfortunately, I will not do proxy because I know this is how bots get stolen, and I am so sorry because I know proxy is how a lot of people like chatting, but I don't really want my stuff getting stolen </3

Heading back into my angst era </3
